\tzpentry{ID4705}{Magnetic Helicity Functional Correction}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4705 introduces Magnetic Helicity Functional Correction as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\\mathcal{H}_M = \\int_V \\mathbf{A} \\cdot \\mathbf{B} \\, d^3x\n\\end{equation}
